name: Castle of Dreams - Betrayal
desc: If 2 or more monsters were Special Summoned from your opponent's Deck and/or Extra Deck this turn, while you control a "Castle of Dreams" Field Spell: Take control of 1 monster your opponent controls, then if you took control of an Effect Monster, that monster gains the following effect: Once per turn, when your opponent activates a monster effect: Destroy that monster. You can only activate 1 "Castle of Dreams - Betrayal" per turn.
strings: Take control of 1 monster your opponent controls
Once per turn, when your opponent activates a monster effect: Destroy that monster.
